title: Richly Flavored Mediterranean Lamb Pilaf
description: A hearty and flavorful pilaf featuring lamb, sweet sherry, and a blend of Mediterranean spices, perfect for a post-workout meal.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large saucepan over medium-high heat.
Add the lamb pieces and cook until browned on all sides, about 5 minutes.
Add the chopped onion and cook until softened, about 3 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute.
Add the sweet sherry and cook until the liquid is almost completely evaporated, about 2 minutes.
Add the uncooked white rice, dried oregano, and salt-free seasoning blend, and stir to combine.
Add 2 cups of water to the saucepan and bring to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low, cover, and simmer for 20 minutes, or until the rice is tender and the liquid is absorbed.
